title: Voice System Template
summary: Created template voice system with 3 files: (1) retrieve_voice_lessons.py - file-based lesson retrieval (no semantic memory dependency, portable), (2) voice-lessons.md - template with example lessons marked [Example] for users to replace, (3) voice-system-prompt.md - documentation explaining the feedback loop and how to build a voice library.
design_decisions: Removed semantic memory integration (N5MemoryClient) - template uses pure file-based storage for portability
Marked example lessons with [Example] prefix so users know to replace them
Included 'Building Your Voice Library' section explaining the feedback loop workflow
notes_for_orchestrator: The GitHub URL references (vrijenattawar/n5os-ode) in other scripts (n5_load_context.py, session_state_manager.py, etc.) from W1.1 scope contain V's GitHub username. These should be parameterized or removed in a future pass if the repo is meant to be fully anonymized.
